examples.review: To be completely fair, the only redeeming factor was the food, which was above average, but couldn't make up for all the other deficiencies of Teodora.
The food is uniformly exceptional, with a very capable kitchen which will proudly whip up whatever you feel like eating, whether it's on the menu or not.
Our agreed favorite is the orrechiete with sausage and chicken (usually the waiters are kind enough to split the dish in half so you get to sample both meats).
The lobster sandwich is $24 and although it was good it was not nearly enough to warrant that price.
For the price, you cannot eat this well in Manhattan.
Price no more than a Jersey deli but way better.
The design and atmosphere is just as good.
The price is reasonable although the service is poor.
would have rather tried terrace in the sky or water club for that price
